    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class car.CarController
    Entry point of the program.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class gameGUI.PixelDriftGUI
    Main so we can run the game which calls the PixelDriftGUI constructor
    main(String[]) - Static method in class test.TrackPackageTest
    Main to run the class and tests
    main(String[]) - Static method in class track.TrackDrawerGUI
    Main to create a new TrackDrawerGUI and start the drawer
    main(String[]) - Static method in class track.TrackGenerator
     
    maxSpeed - Variable in enum class track.Tile.Surface
     
    mouseClicked(MouseEvent) - Method in class gameGUI.PixelDriftGUI
    Required method, not implemented
    mouseClicked(MouseEvent) - Method in class track.TrackDrawerGUI
    Repaints the tile when mouse clicked
    mouseDragged(MouseEvent) - Method in class track.TrackDrawerGUI
    Used when the mouse is dragged to repaint the track
    mouseEntered(MouseEvent) - Method in class gameGUI.PixelDriftGUI
    Required method, not implemented
    mouseEntered(MouseEvent) - Method in class track.TrackDrawerGUI
    Not used
    mouseExited(MouseEvent) - Method in class gameGUI.PixelDriftGUI
    Required method, not implemented
    mouseExited(MouseEvent) - Method in class track.TrackDrawerGUI
    Not used
    mouseMoved(MouseEvent) - Method in class track.TrackDrawerGUI
    Not used
    mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in class gameGUI.PixelDriftGUI
    Required method, not implemented
    mousePressed(MouseEvent) - Method in class track.TrackDrawerGUI
    Not used
    mouseReleased(MouseEvent) - Method in class gameGUI.PixelDriftGUI
    Required method, not implemented
    mouseReleased(MouseEvent) - Method in class track.TrackDrawerGUI
    Not used
    move() - Method in class car.Car
    Updates the car's position based on its velocity.
